# PERF-037 positive: append in a request path without a make+cap hint
lang: go
file: PERF-037-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func List(c *gin.Context) {
	rows := c.GetStringSlice("rows")
	var out []int
	for _, v := range rows {
		out = append(out, len(v))
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"sizes": out})
}
